title: antirrhinum sempervirens subsp. densiflorum
intro: Antirrhinum sempervirens subsp. densiflorum, also known as the hairy snapdragon, is a subspecies of flowering plant belonging to the snapdragon family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Antirrhinum sempervirens subsp. densiflorum are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
